message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Worker for T4 Task Entity">
You are worker-4, member of team dev-taskflow-m1m2m3m6.
Superior: Team Lead (TL).
Allowed contacts: TL only.
Do NOT SendMessage anyone else. No peer communication.

YOUR TASK:
T4: M2 — Task Entity + Repository
Build Task entity with JPA annotations, TaskStatus enum, TaskRepository with query methods, and TaskResponse DTO.

Acceptance criteria:
- Task entity: id(Long, @Id @GeneratedValue), title(String, 1-200 chars), description(String, max 5000), priority(String enum HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW, default "MEDIUM"), status(TaskStatus enum, default TODO), createdBy(Long), createdAt(LocalDateTime, auto-set), updatedAt(LocalDateTime, nullable), deleted(boolean, default false)
- TaskStatus enum: TODO, IN_PROGRESS, DONE, CLOSED
- TaskRepository extends JpaRepository<Task, Long>:
  - Page<Task> findByDeletedFalse(Pageable)
  - Search by keyword: title containing (case-insensitive) + not deleted
  - Filter by priority + not deleted
  - Filter by status + not deleted
  - Combined: keyword + priority + status + not deleted (use @Query or Spring Data derived queries)
- TaskResponse: id(Long), title(String), description(String), priority(String), status(String), createdBy(Long), createdAt(LocalDateTime), updatedAt(LocalDateTime)

File Scope:
- ALLOWED: taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepository.java, taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponse.java
- READONLY: taskflow/backend/pom.xml, taskflow/backend/src/main/resources/application-dev.yml
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN

REQUIRED READING (do this FIRST):
1. PLAN: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-PLAN.md
2. CONTRACT: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/2026-03-09-CONTRACT.md
3. Test files: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskTest.java, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatusTest.java, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/repository/TaskRepositoryTest.java, C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend/src/test/java/com/taskflow/dto/TaskResponseTest.java
4. Implementation notes: C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/temp/impl-notes-4.md

YOUR JOB:
- Write code that passes ALL provided tests
- Note: test-agent-4 created stubs for these files — overwrite with proper implementations
- Use @Entity, @Table, proper JPA annotations
- Use @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING) for status field
- Use @PrePersist for createdAt auto-set
- TaskRepository: consider using a single @Query with JPQL for combined filtering, or use Spring Data JPA Specification

PARALLEL AWARENESS:
ONLY run YOUR test files:
cd C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/taskflow/backend && mvn test -Dtest="TaskTest,TaskStatusTest,TaskRepositoryTest,TaskResponseTest" -pl .
Do NOT run the full test suite.

SCOPE ENFORCEMENT:
- ALLOWED: edit freely
- Everything else: FORBIDDEN
- Need out-of-scope file → SendMessage TL

LOG WRITING:
Write to C:/Users/a0304/IdeaProjects/TouchFish-DevTeam/docs/dev-team/2026-03-09-E3/logs/worker-4.log.md (append-only):
On start: [LOG] task=T4 | event=start | files=entity/Task.java,entity/TaskStatus.java,repository/TaskRepository.java,dto/TaskResponse.java
On issues: [LOG] task=T4 | event=issue | detail={description}
Before completion: [LOG] task=T4 | event=complete | files-changed={list} | tests-passed={all|partial}
[METRICS] model=sonnet | input=n/a | output=n/a | duration={estimated_seconds}s

COMPLETION SEQUENCE:
1. Verify all tests pass
1.5. Run `git diff --name-only` → compare against ALLOWED list. Revert out-of-scope.
2. Write final log entries
3. SendMessage TL: task ID, status, tests passed/failed, changed files list
4. Wait for TL response, then approve shutdown
</teammate-message>

1→[SECTION] Project Overview
     2→[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow backend (Auth+CRUD+StateMachine) and frontend (TaskListPage) as a Spring Boot 3 + Vue 3 full-stack app
     3→[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Spring Security + JWT (jjwt 0.12.5) | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vue Router + Axios | Vitest + jsdom for frontend tests | spring-boot-starter-test for backend tests
     4→[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
     5→[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
     6→[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java
     7→
     8→[SECTION] Standards
     9→[SOURCE] none
    10→[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig already exists with JwtAuthenticationFilter import
    11→
    12→[SECTION] Specs
    13→[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
    14→[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md

    16→[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md
    17→
    18→[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
    19→[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format: {message:string, timestamp:ISO8601} via GlobalExceptionHandler | auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header, userId extracted from token claims | password: bcrypt via PasswordEncoder bean | soft-delete: Task.deleted=true, all queries exclude deleted | pagination: PageResponse{content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages} | status-colors: TODO=#6B7280 IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6 DONE=#10B981 CLOSED=#EF4444 | priority-colors: HIGH=#EF4444 MEDIUM=#F59E0B LOW=#10B981
    20→
    21→[SECTION] Tasks
    22→[TASK] id=T1 | name=M1 — User Entity + Auth DTOs | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+DTO, no logic
    23→[TASK] id=T2 | name=M1 — JWT Security Infrastructure | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=3 | complexity=LOW | reason=standalone JWT util+filter, no cross-module
    24→[TASK] id=T3 | name=M1 — Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling | spec=S1 | deps=T1,T2 | files=5 | complexity=MED | reason=auth logic with security integration, cross-module deps
    25→[TASK] id=T4 | name=M2 — Task Entity + Repository | spec=S2,S3 | deps=none | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+repo+enum, no logic
    26→[TASK] id=T5 | name=M2 — Task CRUD API | spec=S2 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=MED | reason=CRUD with pagination+filtering, auth integration
    27→[TASK] id=T6 | name=M3 — Task State Machine | spec=S3 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=simple state transition logic, few files
    28→[TASK] id=T7 | name=M6 — Frontend Infrastructure + Store | spec=S4 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=Pinia store+axios+router, complex mocking in tests
    29→[TASK] id=T8 | name=M6 — Frontend Task List Components | spec=S4 | deps=T7 | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=5 Vue components, jsdom+vue-test-utils mocking
    30→
    31→[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
    32→[DEP] T1, T2, T4 (parallel) → T3 | T3 + T4 → T5, T6 (parallel) | T7 → T8

[SECTION] Project Overview
[GOAL] Implement TaskFlow backend (Auth+CRUD+StateMachine) and frontend (TaskListPage) as a Spring Boot 3 + Vue 3 full-stack app
[ARCH] Spring Boot 3.2.3 + H2 in-memory | Spring Security + JWT (jjwt 0.12.5) | Vue 3 + Pinia + Vue Router + Axios | Vitest + jsdom for frontend tests | spring-boot-starter-test for backend tests
[NAMING] Java: camelCase fields, PascalCase classes, package com.taskflow.{layer} | Vue: PascalCase components, camelCase props/methods | DTO suffix for data transfer objects (e.g. TaskResponse, RegisterRequest)
[CONSTRAINTS] Max 5 ALLOWED files per task | Soft-delete for tasks (deleted=true) | JWT 24h expiry | No M4/M5 — assignee shows "未指派", tags empty | H2 create-drop (no migrations)
[SHARED] taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/Task.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/entity/TaskStatus.java | taskflow/backend/src/main/java/com/taskflow/config/SecurityConfig.java

[SECTION] Standards
[SOURCE] none
[OVERRIDE] follow-actual-code | SecurityConfig already exists with JwtAuthenticationFilter import

[SECTION] Specs
[SPEC] id=S1 | name=M1-Authentication | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M1-auth.md
[SPEC] id=S2 | name=M2-Task-CRUD | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M2-task-crud.md
[SPEC] id=S3 | name=M3-Task-State-Machine | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M3-task-state-machine.md
[SPEC] id=S4 | name=M6-Task-List-Page | path=taskflow/docs/specs/M6-task-list-page.md

[SECTION] Cross-Cutting Concerns
[CROSS-CUTTING] error-format: {message:string, timestamp:ISO8601} via GlobalExceptionHandler | auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header, userId extracted from token claims | password: bcrypt via PasswordEncoder bean | soft-delete: Task.deleted=true, all queries exclude deleted | pagination: PageResponse{content,page,size,totalElements,totalPages} | status-colors: TODO=#6B7280 IN_PROGRESS=#3B82F6 DONE=#10B981 CLOSED=#EF4444 | priority-colors: HIGH=#EF4444 MEDIUM=#F59E0B LOW=#10B981

[SECTION] Tasks
[TASK] id=T1 | name=M1 — User Entity + Auth DTOs | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+DTO, no logic
[TASK] id=T2 | name=M1 — JWT Security Infrastructure | spec=S1 | deps=none | files=3 | complexity=LOW | reason=standalone JWT util+filter, no cross-module
[TASK] id=T3 | name=M1 — Auth Service + Controller + Error Handling | spec=S1 | deps=T1,T2 | files=5 | complexity=MED | reason=auth logic with security integration, cross-module deps
[TASK] id=T4 | name=M2 — Task Entity + Repository | spec=S2,S3 | deps=none | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=pure entity+repo+enum, no logic
[TASK] id=T5 | name=M2 — Task CRUD API | spec=S2 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=MED | reason=CRUD with pagination+filtering, auth integration
[TASK] id=T6 | name=M3 — Task State Machine | spec=S3 | deps=T3,T4 | files=4 | complexity=LOW | reason=simple state transition logic, few files
[TASK] id=T7 | name=M6 — Frontend Infrastructure + Store | spec=S4 | deps=none | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=Pinia store+axios+router, complex mocking in tests
[TASK] id=T8 | name=M6 — Frontend Task List Components | spec=S4 | deps=T7 | files=5 | complexity=HIGH | reason=5 Vue components, jsdom+vue-test-utils mocking

[SECTION] Task Dependency Graph
[DEP] T1, T2, T4 (parallel) → T3 | T3 + T4 → T5, T6 (parallel) | T7 → T8
[WAVE] 1a=T1,T2,T4 | 1b=T7 | 2=T3 | 3a=T5,T6 | 3b=T8

file.content:
# T4: M2 — Task Entity + Repository — Implementation Notes

## What the tests expect

### Task Entity (`com.taskflow.entity.Task`)
- Must be a JPA `@Entity` with `@Table(name = "tasks")` (or similar)
- Fields:
  - `id` — `Long`, `@Id`, `@GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)`
  - `title` — `String`, `@Column(nullable = false, length = 200)`
  - `description` — `String`, `@Column(length = 5000)`
  - `priority` — `String`, default `"MEDIUM"` (field initializer)
  - `status` — `TaskStatus` enum, default `TaskStatus.TODO` (field initializer)
  - `createdBy` — `Long`
  - `createdAt` — `LocalDateTime`, consider `@PrePersist` for auto-set
  - `updatedAt` — `LocalDateTime`, consider `@PreUpdate` for auto-set
  - `deleted` — `boolean`, default `false` (field initializer)

### TaskStatus Enum (`com.taskflow.entity.TaskStatus`)
- Already fully implemented in stub: `TODO`, `IN_PROGRESS`, `DONE`, `CLOSED`
- No changes needed

### TaskRepository (`com.taskflow.repository.TaskRepository`)
- Already has correct method signatures in stub
- Extends `JpaRepository<Task, Long>`
- Methods:
  - `findByDeletedFalse(Pageable)` — returns only non-deleted tasks
  - `findByDeletedFalseAndTitleContainingIgnoreCase(String, Pageable)` — keyword search
  - `findByDeletedFalseAndPriority(String, Pageable)` — priority filter
  - `findByDeletedFalseAndStatus(TaskStatus, Pageable)` — status filter

### TaskResponse DTO (`com.taskflow.dto.TaskResponse`)
- Already fully implemented in stub with all getters/setters
- Fields: id, title, description, priority, status, createdBy, createdAt, updatedAt
- No changes needed for DTO tests to pass

## What needs to change for tests to go GREEN
1. **Task.java**: Add JPA annotations (`@Entity`, `@Id`, `@GeneratedValue`, `@Column`), add field initializers for defaults (`priority = "MEDIUM"`, `status = TaskStatus.TODO`, `deleted = false`)
2. **TaskStatus.java**: Already complete — no changes
3. **TaskRepository.java**: Already complete with Spring Data derived query methods — no changes needed once Task is a proper JPA entity
4. **TaskResponse.java**: Already complete — no changes

## Key test categories
- **Entity unit tests** (9 tests): field accessors, defaults, boundary values
- **Enum tests** (5 tests): value count and names
- **Repository integration tests** (10 tests): CRUD, pagination, filtering, soft-delete exclusion
- **DTO unit tests** (9 tests): field accessors, contract compliance

## Test compilation status
- All 4 T4 test files compile successfully
- Cannot run tests yet due to other agents' test files having unresolved dependencies (AuthDtoValidationTest, JwtUtilTest, UserRepositoryTest, JwtAuthenticationFilterTest)
- Expected behavior: entity/enum/DTO unit tests would PASS with current stubs (stubs have getters/setters); repository tests would FAIL because Task is not a JPA entity

spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:h2:mem:taskflow
    driver-class-name: org.h2.Driver
    username: sa
    password:
  h2:
    console:
      enabled: true
      path: /h2-console
  jpa:
    hibernate:
      ddl-auto: create-drop
    show-sql: true
    properties:
      hibernate:
        format_sql: true
